content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event Type & Context**: This is a pull request synchronize event for PR #214 "feat: isoform review of mouse Ang2 (salvaged)" by @cmungall. I'm being asked to provide a comprehensive code review.

b. **Request Type**: This is a code review request - the user wants feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key Information**:
   - PR adds salvaged isoform-focused review for mouse Ang2 (angiogenin-related protein)
   - 61 files changed with 6152 additions and 267 deletions
   - Includes bioinformatics analysis script, publication files, and gene review YAML
   - Previous Claude comments show this has been reviewed before with positive feedback

d. **Main Tasks**:
   - Review the bioinformatics script for code quality and best practices
   - Examine the gene review YAML for schema compliance
   - Check publication files for consistency
   - Look for security issues, performance concerns, and bugs
   - Assess test coverage and documentation

e. **Plan of Action**:
   - Read project guidelines from CLAUDE.md
   - Examine the main bioinformatics analysis script
   - Review the gene annotation YAML files
   - Check publication file structure and consistency
   - Validate schema compliance where possible
   - Provide comprehensive feedback via GitHub comment

f. **Potential Limitations**: I may not be able to run the actual validation commands due to dependencies, but I can perform manual code review and structural analysis.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: Isoform Review of Mouse Ang2 (Salvaged) I'll provide comprehensive feedback on code quality, best practices, potential issues, and adherence to project guidelines. #### Review Checklist: - [ ] Read project guidelines and schema requirements - [ ] Review main gene annotation file (Ang2-ai-review.yaml) - [ ] Examine bioinformatics analysis code and results - [ ] Check publication files formatting and structure - [ ] Validate YAML schema compliance - [ ] Assess isoform tracking implementation - [ ] Check for security and performance considerations - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback and recommendations --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24757105346)
